ModMetaData.name: Abyssal Protocol
ModMetaData.author: Neversalimus
ModMetaData.description: Starter framework for a techno-demonic RimWorld mod. Includes: - Abyssal Summoning Circle worktable - Abyssal residue resource - Archon Sigil item with custom C# use effect - Starter boss summon pipeline - Two starter weapons - One starter implant - EN/RU keyed strings - Placeholder sprites
